page.title: Relative Clauses with Whose and Which
page.subtitle_html: Relative Clauses with Whose and Which — B2 relative clauses with whose for possession and which for things or whole clauses.
page.subtitle_text: B2 relative clauses with whose for possession and which for things or whole clauses.
tags: Relative Clauses with Whose and Which

blocks.body: {"level":"B2","intro":"Relative Clauses with Whose and Which: Relative clauses with whose and which допомагають уточнювати possession, objects, ideas and extra information у B2 реченнях.","rules":[{"label":"Whose","text":"Use whose before a noun to show possession or relationship.","example":"The designer whose idea won was promoted."},{"label":"Which","text":"Use which for things, ideas, or extra non-defining information.","example":"The plan, which was risky, worked well."},{"label":"Commas","text":"Use commas when the relative clause adds extra, non-essential information.","example":"My laptop, which I bought last year, is slow."}]}

blocks.heading: B2 focus
blocks.body: This compact page exists as the theory anchor for the Polyglot English B2 lesson package.
